constructor_fan_in.conclusion: The recognized class set shrank by one while the largest call-site concentration was unchanged; no pass threshold applies.
constructor_fan_in.method: Count production call expressions whose terminal name matches a production class.

import_breadth.conclusion: Import breadth moved toward explicit bootstrap integration points; the increased maximum is advisory rather than a regression threshold.
import_breadth.method: Count distinct imported blackcell top-level roots per production module.

module_size.conclusion: The two ratified protocol hotspots became smaller while phase modules increased the total module count; neither count is a gate.
module_size.method: Count physical UTF-8 source lines per production Python module.

package_co_change.conclusion: The history window grew by three commits, so the small count increase does not establish greater causal coupling.
limitations: history can contain broad migrations and removed package roots
co-change does not distinguish causal coupling from coordinated delivery
results are advisory and have no pass threshold
package_co_change.method: Count each unordered top-level src/blackcell package pair once per non-merge commit.

protocol_breadth.conclusion: The broad field-copying context Protocol family was retired; remaining broad Protocols retain independent runtime responsibilities.
protocol_breadth.method: Count declared and transitive same-module Protocol method members.

record_similarity.conclusion: Field similarity remained unchanged because similar durable records with distinct ownership were intentionally retained.
record_similarity.method: Compare declared annotated fields for the four AC00 record pairs.

advisory.policy: All six measurements are advisory; no value is a CI threshold.

provenance.reproducibility: Not asserted after retirement; remeasure the named methods against the then-current tree when a future decision needs current values.
provenance.retention: Methods, observations, and conclusions are retained directly in this decision; branch-only commit and deleted-manifest references are intentionally omitted.

architecture_fitness.selection_policy: CI invokes every required rule by its exact pytest node ID; a missing or renamed node fails collection.

boundary: binary architecture rules and threshold-free advisory measurements
explicitly_unchanged: authority, replay, durability, and recovery semantics

source_bound_candidate.reason: Project-wide source binding forced evidence reissuance after every ordinary change without an independent release or persisted-contract boundary.
source_bound_candidate.replacement: required status checks with non-skippable binary architecture tests and the complete maintained quality suite
